- [ ] Tests added or updated (`test/`)
- [ ] `flutter analyze` clean
- [ ] `flutter test` all tests pass
- [ ] Screenshots included for UI changes
- [ ] No verbatim rulebook prose added
- [ ] No GMT artwork added
